---
title: Enfant qui court derrière un petit chat
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557555/enfantcourtdeguise_20240325_wxj5oe.png
description: Enfant qui court derrière un petit chat 
categories: ["children illustration"]
date: 2024-03-25
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557555/enfantcourtdeguise_20240325_wxj5oe.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
